# Support

Need a hand with an Allons-y Studio project? Here's how to get help. 💜

## Before you ask

1. **Check the docs** — most projects have a README and, where relevant, a docs
   site or wiki. The answer is often there.
2. **Search existing issues and discussions** — someone may have already hit
   the same thing.

## Where to get help

| I want to…                                  | Go to…                                                                                |
| ------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Ask a question or get usage help            | [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/allonsy-studio/discussions)                     |
| Report a reproducible bug                   | [Open an issue](https://github.com/allonsy-studio/stylelint-header/issues/new/choose) |
| Request a feature                           | [Open an issue](https://github.com/allonsy-studio/stylelint-header/issues/new/choose) |
| Report a security vulnerability (privately) | [Security policy](SECURITY.md)                                                        |
| Contribute a fix or feature                 | [Contributing guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)                                                 |

## Filing a good question

Help us help you by including:

- What you're trying to do (the goal, not just the error).
- What you expected to happen and what actually happened.
- Relevant versions (package, browser, OS) and a minimal reproduction if you can.

## Response expectations

Our projects are maintained by a small team and community volunteers. We do our
best to respond promptly, but please be patient — and feel free to help others
while you wait!

## Commercial / priority support

We don't currently offer paid support. If our work is valuable to you, consider
[supporting it](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/castastrophe) ☕.
